kh_findcap: Phnom Penh! Where does Phnom Penh live? Find Phnom Penh's country!
kh_hint: The biggest temple in the whole world hides in my jungle!
kh_tease: My name starts with, Cam... Cam...
kh_captease: My capital city starts with, Phnom... Phnom...
kh_flaghint: Red and blue with a white temple in the middle!
kh_capcue: Phnom Penh! A royal palace with pointy golden roofs by the river!
vn_cue: Vietnam! Pho noodle soup — slurp! And boats sail in a bay full of stone mountains!
vn_findcap: Hanoi! Where does Hanoi live? Find Hanoi's country!
vn_hint: My noodle soup goes slurp, and boats sail between my stone mountains!
vn_tease: My name starts with, Viet... Viet...
vn_captease: My capital city starts with, Ha... Ha...
vn_flaghint: Red with one big yellow star!
vn_capcue: Hanoi! A thousand scooters go beep beep past glowing red lanterns!
my_cue: Malaysia! Twin towers — two tall silver towers holding hands with a bridge!
my_findcap: Kuala Lumpur! Where does Kuala Lumpur live? Find Kuala Lumpur's country!
my_hint: Two tall silver towers hold hands with a bridge in me!
my_tease: My name starts with, Malay... Malay...
my_captease: My capital city starts with, Kuala... Kuala...
my_flaghint: Red and white stripes with a moon and sun-star on blue!
my_capcue: Kuala Lumpur! The twin Petronas Towers sparkle like two silver rockets!
sg_cue: Singapore! The Merlion — a lion with a fish tail spitting water! Whoosh!
sg_findcap: Singapore City! Where does Singapore City live? Find its country!
sg_hint: My lion has a fish tail and spits water! Whoosh!
sg_tease: My name starts with, Singa... Singa...
sg_captease: My capital city sounds just like me! Singa... Singa...
sg_flaghint: Red and white with a moon and five little stars!
sg_capcue: Singapore City! Super-trees light up like magic at night!
id_cue: Indonesia! Seventeen THOUSAND islands! And real dragons live on one — Komodo dragons!
id_findcap: Jakarta! Where does Jakarta live? Find Jakarta's country!
id_hint: I have seventeen thousand islands, and real dragons live on one!
id_tease: My name starts with, Indo... Indo...
id_captease: My capital city starts with, Jakar... Jakar...
id_flaghint: Red on top, white below — just two stripes!
id_capcue: Jakarta! A big monument with a golden flame on top!
ph_cue: Philippines! Thousands of islands, the sweetest mangoes, and jeepney buses — beep beep!
ph_findcap: Manila! Where does Manila live? Find Manila's country!
ph_hint: Thousands of islands, the sweetest mangoes, and beep beep jeepneys!
ph_tease: My name starts with, Phili... Phili...
ph_captease: My capital city starts with, Mani... Mani...
ph_flaghint: Blue and red with a white triangle, sun and stars!
ph_capcue: Manila! Jeepney buses painted in every colour — like party cars!
bn_cue: Brunei! A tiny country where the king lives in the biggest palace in the world!
bn_capital: Brunei's capital is Bandar Seri Begawan!
bn_findcap: Bandar Seri Begawan! Where does it live? Find its country!
bn_hint: I am tiny, but my king lives in the biggest palace in the world!
bn_tease: My name starts with, Bru... Bru...
bn_captease: My capital city starts with, Bandar... Bandar...
bn_flaghint: Yellow with black and white stripes and a red sign!
bn_capcue: Bandar Seri Begawan! A golden mosque that floats on the water!
kz_cue: Kazakhstan! So so big! Apples were born here — the very first apples! And horses everywhere!
kz_findcap: Astana! Where does Astana live? Find Astana's country!
kz_hint: The very first apples grew in me! And I am so so big!
kz_tease: My name starts with, Kazak... Kazak...
kz_captease: My capital city starts with, Asta... Asta...
kz_flaghint: Sky blue with a golden sun and a flying eagle!
kz_capcue: Astana! Shiny space-age buildings standing in the snow!
uz_cue: Uzbekistan! Blue blue tiled palaces on the old Silk Road, and sweet sweet melons!
uz_findcap: Tashkent! Where does Tashkent live? Find Tashkent's country!
uz_hint: Blue tiled palaces stand on my old Silk Road, and my melons are the sweetest!
uz_tease: My name starts with, Uzbek... Uzbek...
uz_captease: My capital city starts with, Tash... Tash...
uz_flaghint: Blue, white and green stripes with a moon and stars!
uz_capcue: Tashkent! Even the underground train stations look like blue palaces!
tm_cue: Turkmenistan! A desert with a big fire pit that never stops burning — whoa, so hot!
tm_findcap: Ashgabat! Where does Ashgabat live? Find Ashgabat's country!
tm_hint: My desert has a fire pit that has burned for fifty years — never stops!
tm_tease: My name starts with, Turkmen... Turkmen...
tm_captease: My capital city starts with, Ashga... Ashga...
tm_flaghint: Green with a beautiful carpet pattern on the side!
tm_capcue: Ashgabat! A city of white white marble — everything shines!
kg_cue: Kyrgyzstan! Mountains everywhere, and golden eagles that fly with their friends the hunters!
kg_findcap: Bishkek! Where does Bishkek live? Find Bishkek's country!
kg_hint: My golden eagles fly with their hunter friends over big mountains!
kg_tease: My name starts with, Kirgi... Kirgi...
kg_captease: My capital city starts with, Bish... Bish...
kg_flaghint: Red with a golden sun that has a tent top inside!
kg_capcue: Bishkek! Snowy mountains peek over the whole city!
tj_cue: Tajikistan! Mountains SO high, people call them the Roof of the World!
tj_findcap: Dushanbe! Where does Dushanbe live? Find Dushanbe's country!
tj_hint: My mountains are called the Roof of the World — SO high!
tj_tease: My name starts with, Tajik... Tajik...
tj_captease: My capital city starts with, Dushan... Dushan...
tj_flaghint: Red, white and green with a crown and stars!
tj_capcue: Dushanbe! A giant flagpole with a giant giant flag — one of the tallest anywhere!
af_cue: Afghanistan! Sweet melons and juicy anaar grow between big dry mountains!
af_findcap: Kabul! Where does Kabul live? Find Kabul's country!
af_hint: Sweet melons and juicy anaar grow between my big dry mountains!
af_tease: My name starts with, Afghan... Afghan...
af_captease: My capital city starts with, Kaa... Kaa...
af_flaghint: Black, red and green standing stripes!
af_capcue: Kabul! Kites dance in the sky — kite-flying champions live here!
sa_cue: Saudi Arabia! A giant sandy desert with camels — and khajoor dates, so sweet!
sa_findcap: Riyadh! Where does Riyadh live? Find Riyadh's country!
sa_hint: My desert is giant and sandy, camels walk slowly, and my dates are so sweet!
sa_tease: My name starts with, Saudi... Saudi...
sa_captease: My capital city starts with, Ree... Ree...
sa_flaghint: Green with white writing and a sword!
sa_capcue: Riyadh! Shiny towers rise straight out of the desert sand!
ae_cue: The Emirates! The tallest building in the WHOLE world is here — up up up it goes!
ae_capital: The Emirates's capital is Abu Dhabi!
ae_findcap: Abu Dhabi! Where does Abu Dhabi live? Find Abu Dhabi's country!
ae_hint: The tallest building in the WHOLE world stands in me — up up up!
ae_tease: My name starts with, Emi... Emi...
ae_captease: My capital city starts with, Abu... Abu...
ae_flaghint: Red, green, white and black blocks!
ae_capcue: Abu Dhabi! A huge white mosque like a palace made of clouds!
qa_cue: Qatar! The football World Cup was played here — right in the desert! Goal!
qa_findcap: Doha! Where does Doha live? Find Doha's country!
qa_hint: The football World Cup came to my desert! Goal!
qa_tease: My name starts with, Kata... Kata...
qa_captease: My capital city starts with, Doh... Doh...
qa_flaghint: Dark red and white with a zigzag line!
qa_capcue: Doha! Glass towers watch little wooden boats sail past!
om_cue: Oman! Magic-lamp land! Nice-smelling frankincense, and dolphins jumping in the sea!
om_findcap: Muscat! Where does Muscat live? Find Muscat's country!
om_hint: I smell of magic frankincense, and dolphins jump in my sea!
om_tease: My name starts with, Oh... Oh...
om_captease: My capital city starts with, Mus... Mus...
om_flaghint: Red, white and green with a sword sign in the corner!
om_capcue: Muscat! Old forts guard the sea where dolphins jump and play!
ye_cue: Yemen! Gingerbread houses! Tall old brown houses with white icing patterns!
ye_findcap: Sanaa! Where does Sanaa live? Find Sanaa's country!
ye_hint: My old houses look like gingerbread cakes with white icing!
ye_tease: My name starts with, Yeh... Yeh...
ye_captease: My capital city starts with, Sa... Sa...
ye_flaghint: Red, white and black sleeping stripes!
ye_capcue: Sanaa! Tall mud houses like gingerbread cakes with white sugar lines!
kw_cue: Kuwait! Tall towers holding big blue balls, right by the sea!
kw_findcap: Kuwait City! Where does Kuwait City live? Find its country!
kw_hint: My towers hold big blue balls by the sea!
kw_tease: My name starts with, Kuwai... Kuwai...
kw_captease: My capital city sounds just like me! Kuwai... Kuwai...
kw_flaghint: Green, white and red with a black shape on the side!
kw_capcue: Kuwait City! Three towers holding big shiny blue-green balls!
ir_cue: Iran! Fluffy Persian cats — meow! And carpets so pretty they look like flower gardens!
ir_findcap: Tehran! Where does Tehran live? Find Tehran's country!
ir_hint: Fluffy Persian cats say meow in me, and my carpets look like flower gardens!
ir_tease: My name starts with, Ira... Ira...
ir_captease: My capital city starts with, Teh... Teh...
ir_flaghint: Green, white and red with a red sign in the middle!
ir_capcue: Tehran! A tall tall tower under big snowy mountains!
iq_cue: Iraq! The very first writing in the world was invented here — on clay! And tall date palms!
iq_findcap: Baghdad! Where does Baghdad live? Find Baghdad's country!
iq_hint: The very first writing in the world was invented in me — on clay!
iq_tease: My name starts with, Ira... Iraq...
iq_captease: My capital city starts with, Bagh... Bagh...
iq_flaghint: Red, white and black with green writing!
iq_capcue: Baghdad! The city from Aladdin's stories — a thousand and one nights!
tr_cue: Turkey! Like the bird — gobble gobble! Hot air balloons float over magic fairy chimneys!
tr_findcap: Ankara! Where does Ankara live? Find Ankara's country!
tr_hint: My name sounds like a bird — gobble gobble! Balloons float over my fairy chimneys!
tr_tease: My name starts with, Tur... Tur...
tr_captease: My capital city starts with, Anka... Anka...
tr_flaghint: Red with a white moon and star!
tr_capcue: Ankara! Home of fluffy angora goats with the softest softest wool!
sy_cue: Syria! One of the oldest oldest cities in the whole world lives here!
sy_findcap: Damascus! Where does Damascus live? Find Damascus's country!
sy_hint: One of the oldest oldest cities in the world lives in me!
sy_tease: My name starts with, See... See...
sy_captease: My capital city starts with, Damas... Damas...
sy_flaghint: Red, white and black with two green stars!
sy_capcue: Damascus! Sweet-smelling damask roses come from here!
jo_cue: Jordan! A whole city carved into pink rock — Petra! And a sea where you float like a boat!
jo_findcap: Amman! Where does Amman live? Find Amman's country!
jo_hint: A whole city is carved into my pink rocks! And my sea makes you float!
jo_tease: My name starts with, Jor... Jor...
jo_captease: My capital city starts with, Am... Am...
jo_flaghint: Black, white and green with a red triangle and star!
jo_capcue: Amman! A city on seven hills with a very old open-air theatre!
il_cue: Israel! A sea SO salty that you float on top like a rubber duck!
il_findcap: Jerusalem! Where does Jerusalem live? Find Jerusalem's country!
il_hint: My sea is SO salty that you float on top like a rubber duck!
il_tease: My name starts with, Isra... Isra...
il_captease: My capital city starts with, Jeru... Jeru...
il_flaghint: White with blue stripes and a blue star!
il_capcue: Jerusalem! A very very old golden city on a hill!
lb_cue: Lebanon! Big old cedar trees — so special, one is on the flag!
lb_findcap: Beirut! Where does Beirut live? Find Beirut's country!
lb_hint: My big old cedar tree is so special, it is right on my flag!
lb_tease: My name starts with, Leba... Leba...
lb_captease: My capital city starts with, Bei... Bei...
lb_flaghint: Red and white with a green tree in the middle!
lb_capcue: Beirut! Big pigeon rocks stand right in the blue blue sea!
ge_cue: Georgia! Big mountains, sweet grapes, and dancing with swords — hop hop hop!
ge_findcap: Tbilisi! Where does Tbilisi live? Find Tbilisi's country!
ge_hint: In me, people dance with swords — hop hop! And mountains touch the sky!
ge_tease: My name starts with, Jor... Georgia!
ge_captease: My capital city starts with, Tbi... Tbi...
ge_capcue: Tbilisi! Warm bubbly bath houses, and a castle up on the hill!
am_cue: Armenia! A big snowy mountain watches over everyone, and apricots grow sweet sweet!
am_findcap: Yerevan! Where does Yerevan live? Find Yerevan's country!
am_hint: A big snowy mountain watches over me, and my apricots are the sweetest!
am_tease: My name starts with, Arme... Arme...
am_captease: My capital city starts with, Yere... Yere...
am_flaghint: Red, blue and orange sleeping stripes!
am_capcue: Yerevan! The pink city — buildings made of pink pink stone!
az_cue: Azerbaijan! The land of fire! Little fires burn right out of the ground — whoosh!
az_findcap: Baku! Where does Baku live? Find Baku's country!
az_hint: I am the land of fire! Little fires burn right out of my ground!
az_tease: My name starts with, Azer... Azer...
az_captease: My capital city starts with, Ba... Ba...
az_flaghint: Blue, red and green with a moon and star!
az_capcue: Baku! Three giant glass towers that look like dancing flames!
welcome: Namaste! Welcome to your world of maps! Chalo, let's play!
mode_puzzle: Puzzle time! Drag each country to its home on the map!
mode_flags: Flag hunt! Look at the flag and tap its country!
mode_capitals: Capital game! Listen, and find the right country!
level_done: Hooray! Level complete! Clap clap clap!
all_done: Wow! You finished the whole map of Europe! You are a champion!
all_done_asia: Wow! You finished the whole map of Asia! You are a champion!
flag_prompt: Look at this flag! Which country does it belong to? Tap it!
guess_who: Guess guess! Kaun hoon main? Who am I?
guess_cap: Ab bolo — what is my capital city? Guess guess!
guess_flag: Now find my flag! Kaun sa jhanda mera hai? Tap it!
got_it_1: Yes yes yes! You knew it! Shabash!
reveal: Okay okay, I will tell you! Dekho...
flag_reveal: Yeh raha! This one is my flag! Look at it nicely!
quiz_reveal: Koi baat nahi! Here is the answer — dekho, it lights up!
welcome_back: Welcome back! Wapas aa gaye! Let's continue our map!
fresh_start: Naya game! A fresh new map — let's start from the beginning!
pick_phase: Which set shall we play? Choose one!
